docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MEDERO, EDDIE VELEZ

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSM 531 HYDE LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDERO, EDDIE VELEZ DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 531 HYDE STREET #8, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94109, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75999392)
PROOF OF SERVICE BY FIRST CLASS MAIL CIVIL (TRANSACTION ID # 75932261) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSM 531 HYDE LP AS TO DEFENDANT MEDERO, EDDIE VELEZ
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSM 531 HYDE LP AS TO DEFENDANT MEDERO, EDDIE VELEZ DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IN THE AMOUNT OF $61.50. (TRANSACTION ID # 75932261) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSM 531 HYDE LP
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 77515036) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF OSM 531 HYDE LP AS TO DEFENDANT MEDERO, EDDIE VELEZ

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75999392), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSM 531 HYDE LP SERVED FEB-24-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-24-2025 AS TO DEFENDANT MEDERO, EDDIE VELEZ

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 75932261), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSM 531 HYDE LP SERVED FEB-24-2025, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75999392) AS TO DEFENDANT MEDERO, EDDIE VELEZ DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSM 531 HYDE LP AS TO DEFENDANT MEDERO, EDDIE VELEZ DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 75932261) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF OSM 531 HYDE LP AS TO DEFENDANT MEDERO, EDDIE VELEZ DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
